description: Runner Monitor page — shows detailed health of the primary runner (JSON health response), list of running task runs with actions (stop, view output, view reflection), and a result panel for displaying action output.

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Runner Health Card

target.label: Required element for Runner Health Card

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Runner Health Card

target.label: Required element for Runner Health Card

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Runner Health Card

target.label: Required element for Runner Health Card

groups.description: Top card showing the primary runner's health status as a JSON response. Includes a status badge (Healthy/Unknown/Unreachable), the raw JSON health object, and a Refresh button.
groups.name: Runner Health Card

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Running Task Runs
assertions.precondition: At least one task run is active

target.label: Required element for Running Task Runs

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Running Task Runs
assertions.precondition: At least one task run is active

target.label: Required element for Running Task Runs

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Running Task Runs
assertions.precondition: At least one task run is active

target.label: Required element for Running Task Runs

groups.description: Full-width card showing active task runs on the runner. Displays a count badge and a table with task run details. Each row has action buttons: Stop, View Output, View Reflection.
groups.name: Running Task Runs

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Result Panel
assertions.precondition: An action has been executed via one of the task run buttons

groups.description: Full-width panel for displaying action results. Shows title (action name) and pre-formatted JSON content with auto-scroll. Appears after any action button is clicked.
groups.name: Result Panel

states.description: Top card showing the primary runner's health status as a JSON response. Includes a status badge (Healthy/Unknown/Unreachable), the raw JSON health object, and a Refresh button.
states.name: Runner Health Card

states.description: Full-width card showing active task runs on the runner. Displays a count badge and a table with task run details. Each row has action buttons: Stop, View Output, View Reflection.
states.name: Running Task Runs

states.description: Full-width panel for displaying action results. Shows title (action name) and pre-formatted JSON content with auto-scroll. Appears after any action button is clicked.
states.name: Result Panel
